title: Creamy Uruguayan Turkey Burger
description: A unique fusion of Uruguay's rich culture and flavors blended with creamy goodness. Features ground turkey, quince glaze and avocado for a delightful twist on the classic burger.

ingredients.name: Mayonnaise (2 tbsp)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a high-quality, gluten-free mayonnaise.

ingredients.name: Avocado (2 cups diced)
ingredients.notes: Use ripe but firm avocados for the best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Chopped onion (1/4 cup)
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion, such as Vidalia or Maui, for a milder flavor.

ingredients.name: Chopped cilantro (1/4 cup)
ingredients.notes: Use fresh cilantro for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Sliced almonds (1/4 cup)
ingredients.notes: Use sliced almonds for added crunch.

ingredients.name: Olive oil (2 tbsp)
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil for the best flavor.

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the ground turkey into 4 equal-sized patties.
Grill the patties for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the patties are cooking, toast the sliced almonds in a small pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Once the patties are cooked, let them rest for 2-3 minutes before assembling the burgers.
Spread a layer of mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a spoonful of quince paste, a few slices of avocado, a sprinkle of chopped cilantro, and finally the top bun.
Drizzle the burgers with a little olive oil and serve immediately.
